content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -1.17%, Bank Nifty -1.43%, VIX +10% to 18.58 signaling risk-off. However, pockets of strength: FMCG (MARICO/DABUR), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS), and earnings-driven momentum (COFORGE +7.5%, BAJAJ-AUTO post-results). Defensive rotation underway — my book is well-positioned with FMCG/Pharma/IT exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.5% unrealized, CMP 1381 with stored SL 1355.44 (gap only 1.9%, close to 1% trail floor). Tightening slightly to 1340 (gap 3.0% from CMP, well above 1% floor) locks in ~6.4% gain while leaving room for normal intraday chop on a Q4 beat + Cigniti merger run. Bullish news (Axis TP 1690, CLSA upgrade, FY27 EBITDA >20.5%). Target 1420 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +2.4% unrealized, CMP 836. Stored SL at entry 820. Per trailing rule (a), at +2% move SL to breakeven+. New SL 825 = +0.6% above entry, gap to CMP ~1.3% (above 1% floor). Q4 strong (revenue +22% YoY, FMCG sector leadership today). Target 855 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.1%, CMP 123.68 vs SL 121.00 (2.2% gap). Thesis intact (geopolitical risk, INR weak). SL well below CMP, no action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -2.8% at 1444.30, SL 1465 — wait, CMP 1444.30 is BELOW SL 1465. Verifying: stored SL 1465, CMP 1444.30 — CMP is 1.4% BELOW SL. SL should have already been triggered intraday on the open at 1468.50 → low 1440. Position likely already stopped. If still active per data, hold per Rule 17 — the SL is the plan, don't pre-empt with panic exit. Q4 was actually strong (PAT +36.6%, volume growth 15.3%); intraday weakness on crude noise is what the SL was sized to absorb."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA -0.2%, CMP 1598.90 vs SL 1600 — CMP just below SL. Per Rule 17, the SL is doing its job; allow it to play out rather than panic-exit. Q4 was a strong beat (revenue +30%, EBITDA +147%), Pharma sector at 52-week high. Intraday wobble within SL absorption budget. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2760.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +1.0% at 2802, SL 2735 (2.4% gap). Tightening to 2760 (~1.5% gap from CMP, above 1% floor) to lock partial gain. Q4 strong (FY26 PAT +47%), refrigerants capex thesis intact. Target 2920 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB flat at 9059 vs entry 9100, SL 9020 (~0.4% gap, very tight). Q4 strong, dividend Rs 47, Citi TP 10500. Don't tighten further — SL gap already inside 1% floor but it's stored, not a new MODIFY. Allow thesis to play."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -3.1% at 353.00, SL 354.00 — CMP BELOW SL. Per Rule 17, allow SL to fire on its own rather than pre-empt. Q4 strong (PAT +31%, NBFC AUM +27%, ATH on May 6). Rate-cut beneficiary thesis intact; today's drop is part of broad financials weakness (PSU Bank -1.88%). Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.8% at 10563, SL 10440 (1.2% gap). Q4 strong (PAT +103%, Rs 150 dividend, buyback at 12000 floor support). Buyback at 12000 well above CMP provides structural support. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "DABUR -2.2% at 475.40, SL 472 (0.7% gap, tight). Q4 moderate, but FMCG sector leadership today. Hold to SL — Rule 17, don't pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1228.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +1.9% at 1241, SL at entry 1226. Per trailing rule (a), nudge SL to 1228 (just above breakeven, gap to CMP 1.0% — at floor). Q4 strong (FY26 PAT +148%, CDMO +36%), near 52-week high, Pharma sector momentum. Target 1290 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "reasoning": "Note: a 5-day-old OPEN MIS order for HFCL @ 133.50 appears in the order book — this is stale and should have auto-cancelled. No action from my end this tick; it's an MIS order from a prior session that the engine should reconcile. Not placing a new HFCL order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 121 well below CMP, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven+ on +2.4% gain, FMCG leadership."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock +6.4% gain while leaving 3% room from CMP for chop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP below SL — allow SL to execute, don't panic-modify."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near SL; Q4 beat and pharma sector momentum support holding to SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2760.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock partial gain on Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight; let thesis play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Below SL on broad financials weakness; allow SL to fire if hit, don't pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 provides structural support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL gap; let SL execute if needed, don't pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1228.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to just above breakeven on +1.9% move."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH watchlist candidates not admitted today with explicit rationale: (1) COFORGE additional add — already held; concentrated cluster (IT) and stock +7.5% today is extended near-term, skip add. (2) THERMAX +11.85% gap up — chasing extended gap, no R:R. (3) TATACONSUM +8.54% gap — same gap-extension reject. (4) CAMS — neutral/positive but already 12% sub-deployed slot; would slot but VIX +10% risk-off argues against adding fresh BFSI exposure today; revisit on stabilization. (5) BERGEPAINT — Q4 results May 12 = binary event within 1 session, Rule 11 NO_ACTION on new entry. (6) NTPC/APOLLOHOSP/HCLTECH/INFY/SUNPHARMA — moderate setups, market in risk-off, prefer to let existing 11-position book run and see if VIX cools before adding 12th name. Book deployed 45% on a high-VIX day is acceptable conservatism given 4 positions already underwater near SL.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 22 of 180. Book is 11 CNC positions, 45% deployed — below 80% soft target but VIX at 18.58 (+10%) and 4 positions (PIDILITIND, WOCKPHARMA, ABCAPITAL, DABUR) sitting at or below their SLs argues for not adding fresh risk into a falling tape. Strategy: let the trailing SLs do their work on the winners (COFORGE, MARICO, LAURUSLABS, SRF), allow the SLs to fire on losers without panic-exit (Rule 17), and re-assess admit candidates once VIX normalizes. Daily loss limit untouched (₹75K remaining). Realized +₹5,566 today already from prior fills. Net positive day; no need to over-trade into risk-off."
}
